_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to make careful observations and measurements using proper tools like thermometers and rulers.

_source.w: We are learning to make careful observations and measurements using proper tools like thermometers and rulers.
y: Accurate measurements help us get results we can trust and compare with others.
Using the right tools for the job is an important skill in science, cooking, building and many other areas.
Careful observation helps us notice things that are easy to miss, leading to deeper understanding.
eg: Using a thermometer to measure water temperature before and after adding ice.
Measuring the length of a shadow at different times of day with a ruler.
Using a balance scale to compare the mass of different objects.
Observing and recording the colour, texture and size of different soil samples.
Timing how long it takes an ice cube to melt using a stopwatch.
Using a rain gauge to measure how much rain fell during a week.
